nasb.text: When you have eaten and are satisfied, you shall bless the Lord your God for the good land which He has given you.

esv.text: And you shall eat and be full, and you shall bless the Lord your God for the good land he has given you.

cnv.text: 你吃飽了，就要稱頌耶和華你的　神，因為他把那美地賜了給你。

ccb.text: 你们吃饱喝足后，要赞美你们的上帝耶和华，因为祂赐给你们那佳美之地。
